name: Memory Master
description: Challenge your mind with Memory Master! A premium memory card game designed to test your focus and concentration. Race against the clock to find matching pairs across three difficulty levels: - Easy (4x4 Grid): Perfect for beginners. - Medium (4x6 Grid): A balanced challenge. - Hard (6x6 Grid): The ultimate test for memory masters! Features sleek animations, satisfying sound effects, and a high-score system. Can you clear the board with the fewest moves and earn a 3-star rating? Play now and sharpen your cognitive skills!
instructions: Mouse Click on cards to flip them Touch Tap on cards to flip them
